anomaly_description: Recording is the soundtrack of a Manufacturing Technology, Inc. promotional film on inertia welding (c. late 1970s / early 1980s), shown in class. No Tom Eagar lecture content present except a brief room-audio fragment at 22:49 of uncertain attribution. Recommend editor review before producing layer 3.

captioner_uncertainties_flagged.note: trailer brake cam manufacturer; possibly Rockwell; preserved with [?]
speaker attribution uncertain (Tom? student?); preserved verbatim with stage direction
